title: xenial xanthous french bread clafoutis
description: a warm, comforting french bread dessert featuring a crispy top and a molten center, perfect for a cold winter evening

ingredients.name: xanthan gum
ingredients.},{: <<--(invalid character found here), fixed version below.

instructions: preheat oven to 375 f. place 1 cup of water, 1 tsp of sugar, and the xanthan gum in a saucepan over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until the sugar dissolves
mix 1 cup of all-purpose flour and 1/2 cup of sugar in a separate bowl
slowly pour the flour mixture into the saucepan, stirring constantly to avoid lumps
transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown
remove the baking dish from the oven and top with 1 cup of shredded garlic
